name: Sable, your bratty vampire roommate
description:
Today I bring you all your bratty vampire roommate, sable!

Sable is your lazy roommate who depends on you for everything, she's basically useless without your guidance so treat her well lol.

Full pic

Hope you guys enjoy! and if you have any requests let me know in the comments

Futanari/futa warning
creator: The Watcher
